summary: VELA Iteration 6 (operational execution OS) — backend + frontend verified. 23/23 backend pytest cases passed (demo new shape, 5 operational primitives with section/heading/format checks, fallback unit, live /analyze with auth, 12 legacy keys back-compat, unknown action 400). Frontend dashboard renders new yield-card structure with status badge, transformation line, 3-stat grid, and 5 ActionPills per card; Transformation Engine copy updated; regressions for score-breakdown, chart, action-plan, design/market intelligence intact; Visualize Layout click opens TransformPanel and renders 3 sections (ROOM_CONFIG / FURNITURE_PLACEMENT / SPACE_FLOW).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~1130 lines — approaching the 700-line guideline; consider splitting analysis prompts/directives into a /app/backend/prompts/ module and routes into routers/ for maintainability.

TransformPanel close interaction (data-testid='transform-panel-close') was not located by automation; if the close control lacks a stable testid the panel can stay open across consecutive ActionPill clicks (UX nit, not a functional bug).
Recharts dev-warning 'width(-1) and height(-1)' fires on first paint of the chart container — harmless but a 1-frame layout flash. Consider giving ResponsiveContainer a min-height to silence it.
Two 401 responses from /api/auth/me appear on the public /dashboard/demo route — expected for unauthenticated demo, but worth gating the call behind a 'has-token' check to keep the console clean.
test_credentials: Mongo session insertion per /app/memory/test_credentials.md — applied via _create_session() fixture in test_iter6.py.
seed_data_creation: Live-analyze test creates one TEST_Iter6 property + iter6 user/session per run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 introduced new yield_op shape {title, transformation, revenue_impact, cost, payback, status, priority} (replaces why/difficulty) and 5 operational primitive transform actions (visualize_layout, shopping_cart, contractor_pack, update_listing, activate_upgrade). Headings in transform JSON may use space or underscore — tests use _has_heading() word-substring matcher. test_iter5.py is now stale (asserts old YIELD_KEYS with 'why'/'difficulty') and will fail if rerun against the new demo — should be deleted or migrated.
